---
title: "Articles"
listing:
  contents:
    - "../population_parameter_and_sample_statistic/population_and_samples.ipynb"
    - "../probability_illusions_flips_in_a_row/flip_heads_in_a_row.ipynb"
    - "../the_foul_the_whistle_and_the_doubt/the_foul_the_whistle_and_the_doubt.ipynb" 
    - "../the_card_the_crowd_and_the_referee/the_card_the_crowd_and_the_referee.ipynb" 
    - "../the_foul_the_card_and_the_gap/the_foul_the_card_and_the_gap.ipynb"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
---
